name: Deposition coming for comp in West Jordan, watch prior injuries?
description: Yes, full honest disclosure of all priors prevents traps.[6]

mainEntity.name: Deposition coming for comp in West Jordan, watch prior injuries?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, full honest disclosure of all priors prevents traps.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, disclose all prior injuries/pains fully and consistently; inconsistencies kill credibility.[6][7] Every detail questioned.[7] Key factors: (1) Work or not, all relevant; (2) Be upfront; (3) Match records; (4) Small or big.[6] Review history with counsel, practice. Honesty wins cases.
